content_body:
We arrived here at Fallen Timber on the evening of the 22nd after a 9-hour drive from South Florida. Not a bad drive, but when we opened the door to a beautifully decorated Christmas tree and a breathtaking view, it made it all worth it! The cabin is EVERYTHING we could have hoped for and more. What a wonderful way to spend Christmas…a crackling fire, a gorgeous log cabin, and family. Thank you, Gary and Lissa, for a wonderful experience!

We are a truly blessed family to be able to spend Christmas together, and we are additionally blessed to be a part of Fallen Timber’s 1st Christmas. We are making many warm memories from the many beautiful moments we are experiencing here. I don’t think it was “just a coincidence” that both my son and I stumbled on Fallen Timber’s website and each separately decided that this was the cabin for our Christmas celebration. The cabin is every bit of what we hoped for, and more. We appreciate Gary’s helpfulness and hospitality. I feel blessed by healing and happiness, and our family is very blessed as we share our moments and days together here at this beautiful Fallen Timber Lodge.
title: North Georgia Mountain Christmas
